description: Second confirmed full mesh hop: ResearchAgent.execute() triggers a real non-det LLM call, emits its result to Aggregator via submit_result(), which auto-finalizes and deterministically aggregates since only one submission was expected.

contracts_used.AgentRegistry: same fresh deploy as SecurityAgent run

steps.purpose: Register the task manifest before ResearchAgent reports a result
Whitelist ResearchAgent as the sole expected reporter for task_id=2

steps.action: ResearchAgent.execute(task_id=2, task_description='Is it well established that Ethereum fully migrated from proof-of-work to proof-of-stake in 2022?', capability='research', aggregator_address=Aggregator)
steps.purpose: Trigger the real non-det LLM call (run_nondet_unsafe + exec_prompt) and emit() the result to Aggregator

equivalence_principle_output.summary: Ethereum completed its transition from proof-of-work to proof-of-stake on September 15, 2022, in an event known as 'The Merge.' This is a well-documented and widely reported milestone in blockchain history.

steps.purpose: Confirm the emit()-triggered submit_result() landed, the task auto-finalized, and aggregation logic ran correctly

result.summary: [research] confirmed: Ethereum completed its transition from proof-of-work to proof-of-stake on September 15, 2022, in an event known as 'The Merge.' This is a well-documented and widely reported milestone in blockchain history.

submissions.summary: Ethereum completed its transition from proof-of-work to proof-of-stake on September 15, 2022, in an event known as 'The Merge.' This is a well-documented and widely reported milestone in blockchain history.

architectural_checks_confirmed: ResearchAgent's non-det LLM call produced a factually accurate, well-grounded answer (The Merge, Sept 15 2022)
'confirmed' correctly did NOT escalate to 'flagged' since it is not in negative_verdicts -> deterministic aggregation yielded 'clear'
Same interface (execute/submit_result) as SecurityAgent, no per-agent special-casing needed on the Aggregator side
Result reached Aggregator exclusively through emit()->submit_result(), no external channel

summary.note: Second of three agents confirmed working end-to-end. FinanceAgent (task_id=3) pending. Coordinator not yet exercised.
